hero.title: Full-Stack Engineer & AI Researcher
hero.bio: I am a passionate software developer focused on bridging the gap between artificial intelligence and beautiful, interactive web experiences. Let's build something amazing together!

about.description: My programming journey is driven by an obsession with creating systems that feel alive. I specialize in designing intelligent backend architectures with Node.js and Python, while crafting pixel-perfect, highly animated frontend interfaces using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. When I'm not coding, I'm usually reading about the latest breakthroughs in Machine Learning.

projects.title: Herbalia
projects.description: An AI-powered botanical assistant and plant doctor. Features a universal plant identifier, an automated disease & health scanner, and a generative AI chat assistant.

projects.title: AI Product Recommendation System
projects.description: An intelligent recommendation engine utilizing AI and ML algorithms to suggest relevant products to users based on preferences and behavior.

projects.title: Responsive E-commerce Website
projects.description: A fully responsive e-commerce platform featuring product listings, search functionality, and a shopping cart with dynamic state management.

projects.title: Price Tracking App
projects.description: An application to monitor product prices and display trends over time, featuring automated price updates and responsive dashboards.

achievements.title: Google Cloud Architect
achievements.description: Designed and deployed a highly available, serverless microservices architecture that scaled to 100k users.

achievements.title: React Native Specialist
achievements.description: Completed an intensive 12-week bootcamp focused on cross-platform mobile development, ultimately publishing a featured app to the App Store.

achievements.title: Full-Stack Certificate
achievements.description: Completed advanced frontend and backend architecture training.
